quality_report.note: Research gate only. Passing this does not prove live-trading readiness.

methodology.split_policy: chronological walk-forward by bar position; no random shuffle
methodology.fold_policy: each train window is split into subtrain and calibration; fold validation is treated as out-of-sample test
methodology.preprocessing_policy: winsorization and standardization are fit on subtrain only, then applied to calibration and test
methodology.threshold_policy: buy/sell thresholds are calibration-set fixed quantiles, never selected from the fold test window
methodology.ensemble_policy: model weights are proportional to validation AUC edge over 0.5; equal fallback if no model beats random
methodology.execution_policy: signal at bar t, execute at next bar open with commission, slippage, lot size, no-overlap state machine, tp/sl and no-overnight handling
